copy.description: Copy files with advanced features like content replacement, image resizing, and glob pattern support

fill-package-json.description: Generate and populate package.json files with automatic exports configuration

run-parallel.description: Execute multiple commands in parallel with sequential readiness control

ts-builder.description: Build TypeScript files with custom configurations and output paths

ts-builder-v2.description: Modern Rollup-based TypeScript library builder with selectable outputs (ESM, FESM, CJS, IIFE/UMD, types) and tree-shaking

fill-package-json-v2.description: Generate spec-correct package.json files with modern exports field, sideEffects, CDN fields and dual ESM/CJS types

watch.description: Watch files and execute commands on changes with path placeholder support

platform-runner.description: Execute scripts with platform-specific variable substitution

run-for-each.description: Execute a command for each item in a list or glob pattern
